---
title: "Development Story"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Development Story}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

Analytics Workstation is also a documented experiment in AI-assisted software engineering.

The repository evolved through architecture, product design, release engineering, QA hardening, and public-readiness passes. As implementation became cheaper, more attention moved to evidence, trust, governance, product identity, and reproducibility.

The development record is preserved in `docs/the_story.md` and `docs/development_ordeal.md`.
